arts.ttl: Antonio Conte Offers ‘Disappointed’ Take on €75M-Rated Liverpool, Man Utd Target Amid PSG Rumors
arts.sum: Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia could be on the move this year. The 23-year-old Georgian has caught the attention of top clubs after deciding not to extend his contract, which is set to run until 2027. According to TalkSPORT, Manchester United’s interest in Kvaratskhelia is growing, with Liverpool also keeping an eye on the situation. arts.ttl: PSG Consider £80M-Rated Aston Villa Talent ‘Gettable’ Despite Barcelona, Chelsea Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are considering various options to strengthen their attack for the second half of the 2024-25 season, with Aston Villa forward Jhon Durán now emerging as a potential target. arts.sum: Kvicha Kvaratskhelia has told Napoli that he wants to leave the club in the January transfer window amid interest from clubs in the Premier League and Paris Saint-Germain. The Georgia international has been the source of much speculation this month, with Chelsea, Liverpool and Manchester United all linked with a move for the unsettled forward. arts.ttl: PSG ready to get creative to seal €100m Duran transfer from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are still holding out on signing Jhon Duran this month despite Aston Villa insisting they will not sell their hot-shot striker for less than €100 million. Villa would only be open to selling Duran for a massive fee and if they can also secure a replacement, with Unai Emery’s side in talks to sign Dortmund forward Donyell Malen .
